function.name: _task_create
function.description: Automatically break down user requirements into multiple executable tasks (Task) and store them in a structured manner. Each task should have clear goals, contextual descriptions, and execution prompts, which can be used to drive subsequent AI Agent automatic execution or human collaborative processing.

threadId.description: Current session ID, used to associate task context

name.description: Task name, should clearly express the task goal or output content (it is recommended to include verb + object, such as "Generate customer management system data table structure")

remark.description: Detailed task description, used as a prompt for the agent to execute the task, should include background, input information, expected results, or constraints

moduleId.description: Informat AI agent ID, needs to call the tool `_task_doc` to obtain
